title: Kurukshetra
subTitle: ACP Prithviraj, an honest man, arrests Chief Minister Baburao's son for raping a woman. Consequently, Baburao leaves no stone unturned to get revenge against Prithviraj.

title: Tathagat Buddha
subTitle: Lord Buddha was born as Prince Siddhartha Gautama in Kapilavastu, Nepal, in the 6th century B.C. Renouncing worldly pleasures, he left his wife and son to seek salvation.

title: Adharm
subTitle: Mr Verma's decision to disown his son Jaggan sparks a vow of retribution. Years later, Jaggan devises a plan to destroy his family and retaliate against his father.

title: Badla Naag Ka
subTitle: A fearless man hurts a snake when it tries to attack his lover. Later, he tries to protect himself from the snake which is trying to exact its revenge.

title: Kaho Naa Pyaar Hai
subTitle: After the untimely death of her lover, Sonia sinks into depression. She soon moves abroad for a fresh start, unaware of the twisted fate that awaits her.

title: Bol Radha Bol
subTitle: While Kishen enjoys village life and romance with Radha, a sinister doppelganger plots. Upon returning home, he'll discover his identity and life stolen by this malevolent impostor.

title: Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
subTitle: Raj and Priya, a married couple, hire Madhubala, a prostitute, as the surrogate mother of their child. Trouble brews when Madhubala falls in love with Raj and insists on keeping the child.

title: Hogi Pyar Ki Jeet
subTitle: Two brothers attempt to fulfil their dying father's wish by marrying two daughters of an old enemy, intending to exact revenge.

title: Suhaag
subTitle: College friends Ajay and Raj always play pranks on each other and then get into trouble. One day, Ajay needs his birth certificate for his passport, but he is shocked to find out his real name.

title: Insaaf Ki Pukar
subTitle: When a dishonest officer destroys their lives, two men unite to fight corruption, facing danger as they strive to restore honour and peace.

title: Insaaf Ki Pukar
subTitle: When a dishonest officer destroys their lives, two men unite to fight corruption, facing danger as they strive to restore honour and peace.

title: Zee Anmol Cinema
subTitle: Zee Anmol Cinema

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Insaniyat Ke Devta
subTitle: Two friends, Balbir and Anwar, join forces to defeat an influential tycoon who wishes to destroy an ashram and use the property to further his own selfish purposes.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Dand-Nayak
subTitle: Bankhelal, who started his career by selling milk, soon becomes a famous ruthless criminal. However, the only person he fears is Inspector Vishal as he has sworn to apprehend him.

title: Acharya
subTitle: On behalf of an idyllic temple town, Acharya takes up the cudgels against a tyrant whose greedy sights are set on the local natural resources.

title: Ghayal
subTitle: Balwant Rai, a corrupt businessman, frames Ajay for the murder of his brother. Later, with no support from those close to him, Ajay takes an unlikely route to seek revenge.

title: Phool Bane Angaray
subTitle: After her husband, Ranjit, a police officer, is killed by the corrupt and powerful Bishamber, Namrata pledges to avenge his death and bring him justice.

title: International Khiladi
subTitle: An international crime boss and his journalist girlfriend fall victim to an elaborate conspiracy that claims an innocent life and turns them into bitter enemies.

title: Ab Tumhare Hawale Watan Saathiyo
subTitle: Kunal falls in love with Shweta and decides to stay in the army to get close to her but soon finds out that she is waiting for her husband Rajeev to return from war.

title: Forensic
subTitle: When a psychotic murderer sets out on a killing spree, Samuel, a medico-legal advisor, uses his forensic skills to unravel the truth behind the heinous deeds.

title: Forensic
subTitle: When a psychotic murderer sets out on a killing spree, Samuel, a medico-legal advisor, uses his forensic skills to unravel the truth behind the heinous deeds.

title: Jai Mahashakti
subTitle: The king of Travancore is ruthless and tortures his subjects. However, Vaikundasamy, an incarnation of Lord Vishnu, decides to put an end to this tyranny.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Afsana Dilwalon Ka
subTitle: A gifted singer, Banne Khan, falls in love with Saba. However, Titlibai, a woman who wants him to marry her daughter, invites him to stay at her house.

title: Muqadama
subTitle: Ajit returns home to see that his wife has killed herself after being raped by three men. He tries to avenge her but is caught by the police and sentenced to be hanged after he kills one culprit.

title: Karma
subTitle: Accompanied by a troubled trio of prisoners, a high-ranking law enforcement officer sets out to avenge the miseries inflicted upon his family by an anti-national group.

title: Baaghi
subTitle: Determined to rescue his former love, the ruggedly handsome Ronny confronts his enemies with a flurry of powerful roundhouse kicks and bone-crushing punches.

title: Jaan
subTitle: A police commissioner recruits a gentleman to safeguard his granddaughter, yet he remains oblivious to the hidden peril. This operative is an assassin dispatched by a relative to eliminate the heir and seize the vast property.

title: Saamy 2
subTitle: Ramasamy, who works as a front-end receptionist for Union Minister Viswanathan, decides to pursue civil service. Soon, Viswanathan's daughter falls in love with him after he saves her from gangsters.

title: RRR
subTitle: A fearless revolutionary and an officer in the British force, who once shared a deep bond, decide to join forces and chart out an inspirational path of freedom against the despotic rulers.

title: Coolie
subTitle: Zafar's obsessive love for Salma leads to her separation from her son, Iqbal. Twenty years later, Iqbal strives to reunite with his mother.
